meta.title: Eduardo Bachosky | Portfolio
meta.description: Full Stack Developer — projects, experience and contact.

about.title: About
about.bio:
My name is Eduardo, I’m 22 years old and I’m a Full Stack Developer passionate about Information Technology and Cybersecurity. I’m a curious and motivated professional who loves exploring new technologies, solving problems, and learning continuously. I have hands-on experience designing and developing web systems in both academic and professional projects.

I work with modern stacks and tools, always aiming to build efficient and secure solutions. I’m also deeply interested in cybersecurity, which adds an extra layer of care to the systems I help create.
about.educationValue: B.S. in Systems Analysis and Development (Faculdade SENAC — Ponta Grossa, PR, Brazil).

calpar.description: Web systems development for CALPAR using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Tailwind, Docker, Kotlin and Java.

unimed.description:
I worked as a full-stack developer on scalable, complex projects, focusing on modern, high-performance solutions for the healthcare sector. I used technologies such as TypeScript, React, Kotlin and Dart with frameworks like Next.js, Flutter and Node.js, and applied Tailwind CSS to build responsive, modern interfaces.

Throughout my career, I was responsible for developing and maintaining robust production applications, leading technical initiatives and collaborating directly with multidisciplinary teams. I actively participated in project management using Agile methodologies (Scrum) to ensure on-time deliveries aligned with business goals.

compass.description:
I took part in the company’s scholarship program, focused on training new talent for the AWS Cloud certification (AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner). I gained hands-on experience with AWS cloud services, cloud security best practices, and configuring and managing cloud environments.

I developed skills in Agile methodologies, cloud infrastructure and security monitoring.

fortnite.title: Fortnite Jam Tracker
fortnite.description: A platform to search and visualize songs from Fortnite, with search by track name, artist and album, plus the ability to listen to previews directly on the site.

sneaker.title: Sneaker Tracker
sneaker.description: A sneaker collection platform where users can manage their favorite sneakers.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: My personal portfolio where I share my projects and experience.
